segments.text: In that day a fountain shall be opened for the house of David and for the inhabitants of Jerusalem, for sin and for uncleanness.
It shall be in that day,
I will cut off the names of the idols from the land, and they shall no longer be remembered. I will also cause the prophets and the unclean spirit to depart from the land.
segments.speaker: The Lord of hosts

segments.text: It shall come to pass that if anyone still prophesies, then his father and mother who begot him will say to him,
You shall not live, because you have spoken lies in the name of the Lord.
segments.speaker: Father and Mother

segments.text: And his father and mother who begot him shall thrust him through when he prophesies.
And it shall be in that day that every prophet will be ashamed of his vision when he prophesies; they will not wear a robe of coarse hair to deceive.
I am no prophet, I am a farmer; for a man taught me to keep cattle from my youth.
segments.speaker: Unknown Prophet

segments.text: And one will say to him,
What are these wounds between your arms?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Those with which I was wounded in the house of my friends.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Awake, O sword, against My Shepherd, Against the Man who is My Companion. Strike the Shepherd, And the sheep will be scattered; Then I will turn My hand against the little ones.
segments.speaker: The Lord of hosts

segments.text: And it shall come to pass in all the land,
That two-thirds in it shall be cut off and die, But one-third shall be left in it:
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: I will bring the one-third through the fire, Will refine them as silver is refined, And test them as gold is tested. They will call on My name, And I will answer them. I will say, 'This is My people'; And each one will say, 'The Lord is my God.'
segments.speaker: The Lord
